history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, portrait-style shot of a young woman's face, heavily stylized with a whimsical, candy-themed makeup look. Her eyes are wide open, with striking grey contact lenses. The eyeshadow is a vibrant, pastel rainbow, with bright yellow on the inner corners, transitioning to soft mint green and light blue on the outer lids, with pink and yellow liner. Her eyelashes are long and dark, with hints of pastel colors on the tips. Her cheeks are heavily blushed with a bright pink, adorned with colorful glitter and small, candy-shaped embellishments like hearts and swirls. Her nose is also highlighted with a rosy pink sheen. Her lips are full and glossy, painted with a bright, shimmering pink lipstick. Wisps of curly, brown hair frame her face, and a single, bright pink barrette is visible in her hair on the upper right side. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a dreamy, almost ethereal glow. The overall mood is playful, sweet, and imaginative, evoking a sense of childlike wonder and fantasy. The color palette is dominated by pastels and bright, cheerful tones, reminiscent of a candy store or a fairy tale.
